message:
feat(service): add load balancer with round-robin, P2C, and weighted strategies (asupersync-1kxvf)

LoadBalancer with Strategy trait, RoundRobin, PowerOfTwoChoices (P2C),
and Weighted (smooth weighted round-robin) strategies. Includes
LoadMetric for in-flight tracking and call_balanced dispatch. 35 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
